description_long: This object consists of a single cigarette and a rectangular cigarette box with a pinkish-red lid and a white body. The cigarette is partially smoked, with a visible ash tip and a brown filter at one end. The box features a printed image of a person with colorful hair and striped clothing on its front face, adding a decorative element. The cigarette is positioned leaning against or protruding from the box in various views. The box appears to be made of cardboard or paperboard, while the cigarette is composed of paper, tobacco, and a filter. The overall appearance suggests a typical commercial cigarette and packaging, commonly found in urban environments.
description: A partially smoked cigarette with a brown filter and ash tip, leaning against a white and pink cigarette box featuring a colorful printed image.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cigarette standing next to the box, with the pink lid and white body visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the cigarette and the box's decorative image of a person, with the pink lid on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the cigarette partially visible behind the box, highlighting the box's shape and lid.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain white back of the box and the cigarette protruding from the side.
attribute_burn_mark: Darkened, charred area at the tip of the cigarette indicating it has been lit and partially smoked.
